visualization.title: Study-duration distribution of interventional pancreatic cancer trials

vega_lite.title: Study-duration distribution of interventional pancreatic cancer trials

notes: Duration measured start→completion at month precision (day ignored; a year-only date is treated as January). Derived from the two dated status fields, not the unverified enrollment field (R-16).

141 trial(s) are undated or have an implausible negative duration (completion before start) and are grouped in an 'Unknown (undated)' bucket, kept for reconciliation and excluded from the duration bins.
User asks for a distribution of study durations scoped to pancreatic cancer interventional trials.

The chart type is appropriate, but the response does not faithfully answer the question as phrased: it shows a duration distribution only for bins with a large 'Unknown (undated)' bucket and the title/encoding are generic rather than explicitly reflecting that this is a duration histogram for the requested interventional pancreatic cancer trials.
